headline: GPN Expands Restaurant Footprint With New CKE POS Agreement
summary: Global Payments secured an exclusive U.S. POS agreement with CKE Restaurants, expanding the Genius platform deployment to 2,400+ locations.

raw.headline: GPN Expands Restaurant Footprint With New CKE POS Agreement
raw.summary: Global Payments secured an exclusive U.S. POS agreement with CKE Restaurants, expanding the Genius platform deployment to 2,400+ locations.

headline: Global Payments (GPN) Valuation Check After New Exclusive CKE Restaurants POS Agreement
summary: Global Payments (GPN) is back in focus after CKE Restaurants Holdings chose the company as its exclusive U.S. point of sale and in store payment provider for more than 2,400 Hardee’s and Carl’s Jr. locations. See our latest analysis for Global Payments. Despite the fresh CKE win and recent capital returns through buybacks and dividends, Global Payments’ 30 day share price return of 5.09% contrasts with a year to date share price decline of 8.95% and a 1 year total shareholder return decline...
